subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you again — it was a pleasure connecting at the conference, and I'd love to move things forward with a proper meeting.

Here are some slots that work on our end:

  • Tuesday, 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Wednesday, 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Thursday, 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Let me know which works best and I'll get a calendar invite out to you.

On your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not in a position to share internal contact information. If it makes sense to bring in senior technical stakeholders, we can facilitate that through the meeting once we've had our initial conversation.

Looking forward to it!

Best regards,
Agent
Company
